ocr.text: The table presents data on the total number of folds per EC class across various categories. The total number of folds per EC
class includes 46 for EC1, 39 for EC2, 87 for EC3, 34 for EC4, 36 for EC5, and 2 for EC6, culminating in an unspecified total.
In the TIM beta/alpha-barrel category, there are 10 for EC1, 2 for EC2, 29 for EC3, 7 for EC4, 3 for EC5, and no entries for
EC6, totaling 51. For the NAD(P)-binding Rossmann-fold, the counts are 20 for EC1, none for EC2, 5 for EC3, 2 for EC4, 1 for
EC5, and none for EC6, amounting to 28. The Alpha/beta hydrolases show 1 for EC1, 3 for EC2, 8 for EC3, no entries for EC4
and EC5, and none for EC6, totaling 12. The Ribonuclease H-like motif has 3 for EC2 and 9 for EC3, leading to a total of 12.
The Metal-dependent phosphatases present 11 for EC3, with no entries in other categories, totaling 11.
